question.label: Head of something
question.name: When you say 'head of something', what is it about that role that pulls you? Is it the scope, the people, the title, or something else?
question.description: Drills into Usman's aspiration for a leadership role to clarify what aspects attract him.

assessment.note: Usman's focus on 'title and money' indicates a lack of intrinsic growth motivation.

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?

new_queue.label: Role anchor
new_queue.name: What's feeling solid in your role right now, and what's stretching you?

new_queue.label: Facilitation skills
new_queue.name: Where are you most eager to stretch your facilitation skills next?

history.answer_excerpt: i dont have someone to guide me , it's really just me on my own
well where can I go next in the company?
i dont have someone to guide me , it's really just me on my own
head of something, not sure but wanting to move forward
